items.title: Arsenal ‘agree £17million Leandro Trossard transfer’ with Gunners set to cash in
items.summary: BESIKTAS have agreed a deal to sign Arsenal winger Leandro Trossard. Trossard, 31, who joined Arsenal in 2023, will leave the club for a total fee of £17.1million. items.title: Giants suffer again as Knights win Magic Weekend opener
